name: insignia_business_information_model
description: Business Information Model extracted from Business Information Model.xlsx.

columns.name: [Data Concept] is grouped by [Data Concept] > Name
[Data Concept] is grouped by [Data Domain] > Name

entities.name: ABN
entities.description: The Australian Business Number for an employer whose employees are IFL superannuation clients

entities.name: Account
entities.description: An Account is held by a client in relation to a specific product or investment. Account information includes balance, account transactions and product information specific to a client, such as beneficiaries, insurance details or client investment allocation strategy.

entities.name: Account Advisor
entities.description: Financial Advisor associated to advising on account

entities.name: Account Code
entities.description: Identifier for the account in General Ledger

entities.name: Account Details
entities.description: Details of when established, status

entities.name: Account Investment Holding
entities.description: Funds invested for the customer

entities.name: Account Name
entities.description: Name of account provided by customer

entities.name: Account Opened
entities.description: Date when account was created

entities.name: Account Owner
entities.description: Customer/s linked to account

entities.name: Account Standing Instruction
entities.description: Amount and bank account details for receiving or making payments into account

entities.name: Account Statement
entities.description: Holding statement, rollover benefits statement, activity statement

entities.name: Account to Pay
entities.description: The account to which a payment is directed

entities.name: Account to Receipt
entities.description: The account from which a payment is received

entities.name: Account Transaction Type
entities.description: Deposit, withdrawal, transfer, rollover, etc

entities.name: Account Type
entities.description: Superannuation, Pension, Investment

entities.name: Accounts Payable
entities.description: Outgoing expenditure to pay for services and goods

entities.name: Accounts Receivable
entities.description: Receipt of money in form of investment activity income, license fees, distributions

entities.name: Action Plan
entities.description: An outline of actions to be taken to resolve or mitigate an identified incident

entities.name: Actively Managed
entities.description: Generally employers with +50 employees and +$50 million in Funds Under Management

entities.name: Advice
entities.description: Advice is information provided to a customer with regards to financial planning. Advice is provided to a customer by a financial advisor, who may be internal or external to Insignia.

entities.name: Advice Audit Information
entities.description: Audit conducted by Insignia as AFSL holder

entities.name: Advice Complaint
entities.description: Insignia investigation into advice provided to client by advisor, evidence and findings

entities.name: Advice Complaint Investigation
entities.description: Material and data collated for investigation into advice complaint

entities.name: Advice Complaint Report
entities.description: Report of findings and recommendations resulting from the complaint investigation

entities.name: Advice Investment Committee
entities.description: Review and approve product listing

entities.name: Adviser
entities.description: Individual qualified and authorised to dispense financial advice under Australian Financial Services License rules and regulations

entities.name: Advisor Characteristics
entities.description: Details of financial advisors associated with IFL

entities.name: Advisor Contact
entities.description: Contact details for a licensed financial advisor

entities.name: Advisor Name
entities.description: Personal name of an individual licensed financial advisor

entities.name: Advisor Remediation
entities.description: Remediation steps to ensure advice provided by advisor is within rules and regulations

entities.name: Advisor Structure
entities.description: Indication of the nature of the relationship between an advisor and IFL: self-employed, IFL employee, independent license holder

entities.name: Agenda Workplan
entities.description: Agenda items for board to consider and preparation material. Prepared annually and amended during year includes schedule of when items will be addressed in board meeting. Agenda items are considered, BAU, standing, must do items, status and item owner

entities.name: Aim and Objectives
entities.description: Financial goals and objectives of customer

entities.name: Annual General Meeting
entities.description: Once a year event information for IFL to share with shareholder company information and vote on important decisions. As part of obligation to stock exchange and corporations law.  Note that sensitivity classification is Public only once the meeting is held, Highly Confidential before.

entities.name: Annual IFL Business Plan
entities.description: Information of strategic plan and objectives from each business area and the group as a whole

entities.name: Annual Report
entities.description: Compiled summary of year's activities and achievements, strategy for a given reporting period

entities.name: Applicable Business Unit
entities.description: The business unit defining risk tolerances.

entities.name: Application Component
entities.description: A sub-component of a business application, such as an optional module that addresses a specific business process within the broader business function.

entities.name: Application Name
entities.description: The name of the application software used on the system

entities.name: Application Owner
entities.description: Designated business owner for the system

entities.name: Application Version
entities.description: Version number of the application software used on the system

entities.name: Approved Product List
entities.description: List of approved investments for a given product

entities.name: Architectural Recommendation
entities.description: A formal recommendation for a technology architecture approach or solution.

entities.name: Architecture
entities.description: Guidelines, frameworks and principles for business, technology and solution architecture

entities.name: Architecture Governance
entities.description: Information related to decision-making and accountabillity for technical architecture decisions.

entities.name: Architecture solution reviews
entities.description: Documentation of internal reviews of proposed technology architecure solutions

entities.name: Archival Services Supplier Information
entities.description: Information related to the use of third-party records management service providers

entities.name: Areas of accountability
entities.description: Functions the position is responsible for to support and manage. Also inclues Budget approval levels, systems to manage, performance metrics

entities.name: Assessment of software currency
entities.description: An assessment of the currency of software versions deployed in IFL for alignment with current business requirements, available features in subsequent releases and security considerations

entities.name: Assumptions
entities.description: Statements of assumed facts that form part of the business case and/or must be true for the project to succeed or the expected benefits to be realised.

entities.name: Audit Management Letter
entities.description: Acknowledgement of auditor of conducted audit and approval

entities.name: Auditor
entities.description: Party conducting and making findings from a financial audit.

entities.name: Authentication Certificates
entities.description: Security certificates issued to verify the identity of network users

entities.name: Authority
entities.description: Legal, Regulatory, Policy, etc

entities.name: Balance
entities.description: Total amount of funds within account as at a date

entities.name: Balance Sheet
entities.description: Asset, Liability and Equity position as at a point in time

entities.name: Base Input Figures
entities.description: General Ledger Actuals, FUM and Flows data

entities.name: Behavioural Analytics
entities.description: Information resulting from the analysis of data about the actions performed by users of an external-facing digital product such as an app or website, and used to assess the performance of marketing campaigns on digital platforms.

entities.name: Benchmark Performance
entities.description: Benchmark defined by PDS compare to actuals. Provides a comparison measure on the performance of the investment. Benchmarks can be against broader market indicators, relative peer investments and a variance up/down shift.

entities.name: Benchmark Returns
entities.description: Details of the performance comparison metrics used to track the financial interests of the members

entities.name: Beneficiary Nomination
entities.description: Nominated person or organisation as recipient of funds on claim of policy or death of customer

entities.name: Board and Committee Structure
entities.description: List of members of board and committee

entities.name: Board Audit Report
entities.description: Outcomes from audit reported to board

entities.name: Board Charters
entities.description: Guidelines boards adhere to

entities.name: Board Meeting Minutes
entities.description: Minutes of board meeting, agenda, attendees

entities.name: Box Number
entities.description: A unique identifier for a box of physical records in an archive

entities.name: Budget
entities.description: Financial budget plan for coming 3 year period, reviewed annually, at various levels, IFL Group, Division, Business Unit and Entity (Trustee and responsible entity)

entities.name: Budget Iteration
entities.description: Adjustment to plan following business review and new information captured

entities.name: Budgetary Assumptions
entities.description: Detail of calculation variables taken into consideration and applied to plan

entities.name: Business Application
entities.description: A solution designed to support a broad business function.

entities.name: Business Change Readiness Assessment
entities.description: The business change readiness criteria and measures for the initiative, to determine the business preparediness for change

entities.name: Business Continuity Plan
entities.description: Recovery timeframes and priorities for critical business activities

entities.name: Business Glossary
entities.description: A glossary of business terms and their definitions used across Insignia

entities.name: Business Performance Review
entities.description: KPIs aligned to specific member cohorts

entities.name: Business Plan
entities.description: Business Plan is the information provided for strategic aim for member outcomes, Registrable Superannuation Entity

entities.name: Business Readiness Checkpoint
entities.description: Results of evaluating business readiness against criteria, taken at several points during implementation including feedback

entities.name: Business Requirements
entities.description: A statement of the business requirements associated with a change plan, outlining objectives and other business considerations.

entities.name: Business Risk
entities.description: An identified potential future event that can have a material negative effect on the IFL business.

entities.name: Business Segment Objectives
entities.description: Sourced from each business area as the strategic objectives for the forward strategy period

entities.name: Calendar of Events
entities.description: List of board events schedule

entities.name: Campaign
entities.description: Implementation of engaging with client through a variety of channels to communicate information message like product eduction, financial advice (general), product changes, opportunity

entities.name: Campaign Budget
entities.description: Cost allocation to deliver campaign

entities.name: Campaign Collateral
entities.description: Messages, websites, calculators, letters, promotional material

entities.name: Campaign Design
entities.description: Details of when the campaign will run, how the message will be delivered and necessary channels to utilised

entities.name: Campaign Owner
entities.description: Person responsible for sponsoring campaign and benefit from campaign outcomes

entities.name: Case Manager
entities.description: IFL person responsible for managing a demand.

entities.name: Change Management
entities.description: Change management describes the information of how to move from current state to desired state and the steps to required to implement change

entities.name: Change Management Framework and Playbook
entities.description: Templates and checklists established to provided guidenance through the change management process

entities.name: Change Plan
entities.description: Information of the plan to implement a change at Insignia, effecting systems, people or process

entities.name: Chart of Accounts
entities.description: The structure of accounts configured under the General Ledger

entities.name: Codebase Framework
entities.description: The software code language used, as well as any coding frameworks used as the basis for the application sofware on the system (where the system has been developed at Insignia)

entities.name: Communication Instruction
entities.description: A customer specified method for contact

entities.name: Communication Plan
entities.description: Details of the method, channel and message to communicate to target audience

entities.name: Communications and Engagement Plan
entities.description: Details of the communications and engagement plan for the initiative/program, including messages and who and when to communicate with.

entities.name: Company Announcements
entities.description: Continuously disclosed company information shared with stock exchange.   Note that sensitivity classification is Public only once published, Highly Confidential before.

entities.name: Company Board
entities.description: Company board information to support and guide governance of organisation

entities.name: Company Group
entities.description: Insignia stock exchange listing information

entities.name: Compensation Band
entities.description: Allowable remuneration level range for the position

entities.name: Compensation Band Approved
entities.description: Band of compensation for the role

entities.name: Compliance Attestation
entities.description: A statement asserting that IFL is compliant with an identified obligation.

entities.name: Compliance Question
entities.description: A component of a compliance attestation to which the obligation owner must respond.

entities.name: Compliance Response
entities.description: The response of an obligation owner to a compliance attestation question.

entities.name: Configuration Rules
entities.description: Configuration rules applied to capture cyber security events and based on log activity of systems

entities.name: Content
entities.description: A description of the kinds of records contained in an archive

entities.name: Continuing Education
entities.description: Obligations to maintain accreditation as a financial advice professional

entities.name: Continuing Professional Development
entities.description: Training or education required and conducted to meet professional accreditation

entities.name: Contract Dates
entities.description: Agreed dates for contract is to run from and to

entities.name: Contract Execution
entities.description: Carrying out and managing contract obligations.

entities.name: Contracts and Agreements
entities.description: Documents for contracts and agreements, including trust deeds

entities.name: Contributions
entities.description: The amount and type of contributions made to a superannuation account by or on behalf of a client.

entities.name: Control
entities.description: Measures established to remove or mitigate a business risk.

entities.name: Control Effectiveness Rating
entities.description: An assessment of the effectiveness of a control in managing the risk it is intended to mitigate.

entities.name: Control Owner
entities.description: The role responsible for defining and managing a risk control, accountable for its effectiveness and ensuring actions are taken in response to control failures.

entities.name: Control Review Frequency
entities.description: Designation of the frequency (eg. monthly, quarterly, annually) that a control is reviewed for effectiveness

entities.name: Control Type
entities.description: Classification of a risk control, eg. Detective or preventative

entities.name: Corporate Governance
entities.description: Corporate governance is information describing decision-making roles, forums and responsibilities, used to ensure that the organisation operates responsibly.

entities.name: Corporate Policies and Standards
entities.description: The guiding principles and rules to adhere to across key responsibility areas at Insignia. Policy documents for areas such as risk, data, diversity and inclusion, responsible investment

entities.name: Cost Centre
entities.description: The business unit that owns a business expense.

entities.name: Cost Centre Name
entities.description: Label given to describe the cost centre

entities.name: Cost Centre Owner
entities.description: Person responsible for managing cost centre and approving cost

entities.name: Crisis Management Plan
entities.description: Describes the immediate actions to be taken during a crisis (such as the Covid-19 pandemic) and includes a management structure, with defined roles, to enable a business disruption to be managed effectively

entities.name: CRR Rule Definitions
entities.description: Specification of rules that are applied to determine a customer risk rating.

entities.name: CRR Trigger Events
entities.description: A list of events, usually client actions or behaviours, that provide input into the calculation of the customer risk rating.

entities.name: Current State
entities.description: Describes the current state of the process or systems to be impacted by the change

entities.name: Current State Conceptual View
entities.description: A representation of the current business and technology state relevant to a proposed technology solution design.

entities.name: Custodian
entities.description: Handles actual assets when held outside of Insignia

entities.name: Customer
entities.description: Customer data includes all information used to identify, describe, and manage Insignia Financial’s customers—individuals, and organisations

entities.name: Customer Account Disbursement
entities.description: Funds received by customer from account

entities.name: Customer Account Fee Structure
entities.description: Information of level and method for applying fees to account

entities.name: Customer Account Transaction
entities.description: Account transaction amounts as a deposit, withdrawal or transfer

entities.name: Customer Address
entities.description: Address information to contact customer to, residential, postal, business

entities.name: Customer Association
entities.description: Relationship customer has to other customer, partner, director or Insignia. Beneficiary, orphaned customer, unadvised customer

entities.name: Customer Behaviour Forecasting
entities.description: Predictive analysis of customer activity or market trends to identify opportunity or changes

entities.name: Customer Business
entities.description: A customer of Insignia that is a business or organisation.

entities.name: Customer Characteristic
entities.description: Attributes of a customer at Insignia

entities.name: Customer Churn Prediction
entities.description: The probability that a given customer will take their business to a competitor within a defined timeframe.

entities.name: Customer Contact
entities.description: Contact instructions and information of a customer

entities.name: Customer Due-diligence
entities.description: Actions taken to ensure that taking on and providing services to a client can be done in accordance with regulations, legislation and IFL policies, .

entities.name: Customer Email
entities.description: Email address/es

entities.name: Customer Employment
entities.description: Employment information of a person, describing employment status, current employer

entities.name: Customer Identification
entities.description: Information of customer and system records identifying uniqueness of customer

entities.name: Customer Inflow Targets
entities.description: Strategic target set to draw in new business for a product based on customer and product analysis and strategic initiatives

entities.name: Customer Life Stage
entities.description: Reflects the current phase of usage of superannuation for superannuation customer, such as accumulation, retirement, etc.

entities.name: Customer Person
entities.description: A customer who is an individual person.

entities.name: Customer Person Details
entities.description: Information describing a person, name, dob

entities.name: Customer Risk Rating
entities.description: A rating of the risk a client poses with relation to money laundering and/or terrorist funding. The CRR value determines the frequency of reviews performed, or reviews can be triggered by certain events. CRR rules run across client, account and product information.

entities.name: Customer Role
entities.description: Describes the Customer connection to the account as owner, investor, beneficiary, managing director

entities.name: Customer Segmentation and Grouping
entities.description: Definitions to identify cohorts of members, by age, tenure, financial position. Groups given descriptive names, like "Nurture"

entities.name: Customer Status
entities.description: Customer is active, prospect, inactive or other

entities.name: Customer Tax Declaration
entities.description: Tax declaration describes if customer has provided TFN and exemption if applicable. Not providing TFN impacts on a customer's taxation rate on income

entities.name: Customer Tax Information
entities.description: Information provided from IFL of use to a customer as part of managing their tax affairs.

entities.name: Customer Telephone
entities.description: Various telephone numbers to contact customer

entities.name: Data Lineage
entities.description: Information mapping the derivation of data items from initial collection, through to various end-uses.

entities.name: Data Reports and Dashboards
entities.description: List of reports and dashboards, user access, source data, owner

entities.name: Date of Birth
entities.description: Date when person was born

entities.name: Dealers
entities.description: Agents responsible for managing the purchase or sale of holdings in an investment.

entities.name: Demand
entities.description: Customer or Advisor initiated interaction with Insignia Financial re financial account

entities.name: Demand Analytics
entities.description: Metrics to track and measure the processing effectiveness and efficiency of demands

entities.name: Demand Channel
entities.description: Email, voice call, webchat, Advisor, governing body or customer portal

entities.name: Demand Correspondence
entities.description: File, emails associated to processing of demand, forms

entities.name: Demand Dates
entities.description: Calendar dates of interactions between IFL and the client in relation to a demand

entities.name: Demand Details
entities.description: Data related to a specific interaction between customer and IFL.

entities.name: Demand Reason
entities.description: The stated reason from the client for why they've contacted IFL

entities.name: Demand Resolution
entities.description: Outcome of the demand management process that leads to the demand being closed.

entities.name: Demand Service Level Agreement
entities.description: Duration required to process demand within before considered in breach or a failure. SLA can be for different stages along demand been processed

entities.name: Demand Status
entities.description: Reflects the current work-status of a demand, allowing demands to be tracked from initially being raised through to resolution and closure.

entities.name: Demand Type
entities.description: Request, query, complaint or question

entities.name: Dependencies
entities.description: A reliance on other projects or externalitiies for some aspect of project success

entities.name: Detailed Objectives
entities.description: A detailed statement of the project's objectives offering more specific expected outcomes than the high-level statement of the project goals.

entities.name: Development Framework
entities.description: Information of goals and objectives for a person to develop skills and career at Insignia

entities.name: Diagrams
entities.description: Plans, maps, instructions and designs provided along with provision of goods and services.

entities.name: Digital Backups
entities.description: Details of digital backup, instructions, frequency, files, databases,

entities.name: Disaster Management and Recovery
entities.description: [insert definition]

entities.name: Disaster Management and Recovery Plans
entities.description: Plans for managing technology outages or other events preventing the operation of technology and access to information.  This includes preparatory plans (eg. backup regimes, establishment of redundant infrastructure, etc.) as well as actions to take once a disaster has occured.

entities.name: Dispute Origin
entities.description: Tracks whether a complaint is raised directly by the customer with IFL or raised via a regulatory agency.

entities.name: Distribution Agreement
entities.description: tba

entities.name: Domains and Sites
entities.description: Web sites and domain names that belong to Insignia, as well as email domains

entities.name: Due Diligence Assessment
entities.description: Supplier risk and credibility check before engagement.

entities.name: Education Qualifications
entities.description: Educational qualifications for a licensed financial advisor.

entities.name: Employer
entities.description: Business or company with employer default provided superannuation fund. Insignia Financial provides servicing of fund for employer and advises of research and legislature changes

entities.name: Employer Company Name
entities.description: The registered business name of an employer whose employees are IFL superannuation clients.

entities.name: Employer Details
entities.description: Name and contact details for employers using IFL Superannuation products for their employees

entities.name: Employer Engagement Agreement
entities.description: Participation Agreement (Plum) or Product Disclosure Statement outlining details of fee structure

entities.name: Employer Member Data File
entities.description: Provides details of employer individual member details and transaciton activity

entities.name: Employer Policy Committee Documentation
entities.description: Information about employer policy committee membership, meeting agendas and minutes.

entities.name: Employer Service Level Agreement
entities.description: Document outlining agreed service levels for each employer partner whose employees are IFL superannuation customers.

entities.name: Employment Conditions
entities.description: Agreed working arrangement person has with Insignia

entities.name: Employment Contract
entities.description: Legal document of employment person signs with the organisation

entities.name: Employment Status
entities.description: Status of persons employment at Insignia, ie Active or Terminated

entities.name: Enquiries and Complaints
entities.description: Enquiries and complaints are customer-initiated interactions with Insignia. These may occur through various channels and may be facilitated by a third-party, such as a regulatory body.

entities.name: Enterprise Metrics
entities.description: Series of metrics definitions determined from consultation with business areas  to capture the enterprise strategy performance

entities.name: Enterprise Models
entities.description: Conceptual and logical representations of information technology-related concepts with an enterprise scope.  Examples include enterprise data models, business capability models, etc.

entities.name: Enterprise Scorecard
entities.description: Enterprise level scorecard of IFL initiatives to view the level of actual to target metrics values

entities.name: Enterprise Strategy
entities.description: Details of the forward looking strategic objectives from contributing business units with supporting metrics and targets

entities.name: Enterprise Strategy Roadmap
entities.description: Outlines timelines of when the strategic initiatives will be delivered from across business areas

entities.name: Evacuation Plan
entities.description: The list of steps and instructions for people to follow in the event of evacuation

entities.name: External Due Diligence Assessment
entities.description: Evaluation of a supplier’s risk, compliance, and capability to support procurement decisions.

entities.name: External Research Partner
entities.description: A third-party provider of market research services.

entities.name: Fact Finding
entities.description: Collection of financial information of client to guide and support advice to be provided.

entities.name: Failure Demand
entities.description: Analysis of reason and cause for failure to fulfil demand or activity (mail out letter unclear message)

entities.name: Fee Structure
entities.description: Disclosure of fee structure for financial advice and actioning plan

entities.name: File Notes
entities.description: Captures the key information discussed during an interaction with customer

entities.name: Finance
entities.description: Finance is information that account for monetary movement within Insignia including fund reporting and corporate finance.

entities.name: Finance Audit
entities.description: Information of conducted finance audit by external audit provider

entities.name: Financial Advisers Register
entities.description: Regulatory body registration of practicing advisor information

entities.name: Financial Advisor Licensee
entities.description: The holder of a financial advice license.  The license holder may employ multiple financial advisors who the license holder is accountable for.

entities.name: Financial Result
entities.description: Consolidated financial performance for period. Published internally to Insignia board and data shared for analysis across business units. Externally shared with governing bodies, ASIC, ASX etc.

entities.name: Financial Result Commentary
entities.description: Explanatory material that provides context and reasons for the results reported in a financial statement.

entities.name: Financial Statement
entities.description: Report of financial accounts

entities.name: Finding
entities.description: The specific findings contained in an audit report submitted to the board.

entities.name: Focus Group Transcript and Recording
entities.description: Text, audio and video data collected during a focus group session.

entities.name: Forecasts
entities.description: Information related to predictions of future states that will impact the effectiveness of the RSE's business plan

entities.name: Four-Monthly Forecast
entities.description: Projection of remainder of current financial year based on YTD actual financials and account for material change to budget plan

entities.name: Fund tax Assessment
entities.description: Assessment of trust tax returns made by the Australian Taxation Office

entities.name: Fund Tax Return
entities.description: Tax returns lodged by trusts to the Australian Taxation Office

entities.name: Funds Under Management
entities.description: Sum total of value of assets, (cash, stocks, etc) within investment

entities.name: Future State
entities.description: Describes the desired end state goal to be delivered

entities.name: Gap Analysis
entities.description: Identified short comings of skills, technology or processes that are required to move to future state

entities.name: General Ledger
entities.description: Record of financial transactions of Insignia and funds

entities.name: Goal Statements
entities.description: A high-level statement of the intended outcomes of a major project

entities.name: Goods and Services Contracts
entities.description: Information of agreed goods and services provisioning by supplier

entities.name: Governing Body Report
entities.description: A version of advice complaint report submitted to the relevant regulatory agency

entities.name: Governing Entity
entities.description: Either responsible entity or trust overseeing investment trust

entities.name: Government Identification
entities.description: Government issued identification, eg passport, license, etc

entities.name: Group Results
entities.description: Financial information of IFL business performance, balance sheet and financial statement.  Note that sensitivity classification is Public only once published, Highly Confidential before.

entities.name: Guidance
entities.description: Advice provided to the business on how to properly manage their records.

entities.name: Hours of Work
entities.description: Minimum hours for person to work in weekly or fortnightly period.

entities.name: Identified Systemic Issue
entities.description: From analysis of complaints to identify the scale and volume of complaint or issue identified. Prepare plan for remediation.

entities.name: IFL Group Tax
entities.description: Information related to managing the tax affairs of IFL.

entities.name: IFL Plan Forecasts
entities.description: Information related to predictions of future states that will impact the effectiveness of IFL's business plan

entities.name: IFL Plan Initiatives
entities.description: Information about projects and programs of work that will deliver outcomes in order to achieve the IFL business plan objectives

entities.name: Implementation Roadmap
entities.description: List of activities, delivery timeframes and dependencies as a map of deliverying change

entities.name: Incident Details
entities.description: Information outlining the nature of an incident that will be used to determine whether the incident qualifies as a breach

entities.name: Incident Impact
entities.description: A statement of the consequences of the incident on IFL.

entities.name: Incident Investigation Information
entities.description: Information gathered as part of the investigation of a reported incident.  This information is used to determine whether a policy or obligation breach has occurred and will inform any subsequent plan for management.

entities.name: Incident Owner
entities.description: IFL person accountable for the invistigation of a reported incident and management where the incident is determined to be a breach.

entities.name: Incidents and Breaches
entities.description: A reported event that may be an event where a risk has eventuated or a control has been breached.  This includes all business risks including workplace health and safety incidents.  Note that the sensitivity rating is for most sensitive incidents.  Many would be rated as Internal.

entities.name: Industry
entities.description: Industry sector to which an employer whose employees are IFL superannuation clients belong

entities.name: Information Assets
entities.description: Details of collections of information (information systems, archives, etc.) held by Insignia

entities.name: Information Classification Schedule
entities.description: A schedule of information classification by sensitivity

entities.name: Information Management
entities.description: Information mangement policies, standards, guidance and advice describes how information and data at Insignia is to be handled, processed and retained

entities.name: Information Management Guidance
entities.description: Information provided to the business on how to properly manage information.

entities.name: Information Ownership
entities.description: Information outlining accountabilities and responsibilities for information assets

entities.name: Initiative Backlog
entities.description: List of initiatives

entities.name: Initiative Business Case
entities.description: A statement of the costs and benefits related to an initiative that informs the decision whether to adopt an initiative or not.

entities.name: Initiatives
entities.description: Information of initiatives to put forward to create business improvement including benefits, implementation and origination details

entities.name: Institutional Investor
entities.description: Prospective and current managers of large funds, industry super fund, endowment, insurance funds

entities.name: Institutional Investor Contract
entities.description: Formal document outlining the agreement between IFL and an institutional investor, specifying fees, services and other details.

entities.name: Institutional Investor Dossier
entities.description: Collectional of information of an institutional investor to aid engagement and discovery of best suited products and strategies

entities.name: Institutional Investor Key Contact
entities.description: The main point of contact used by IFL to interact with an institutional investor

entities.name: Institutional Investor Research Analysis
entities.description: Analysis of investment performance provided to institutional investors

entities.name: Institutional Investor Risk Appetite
entities.description: An assessment of the propensity for risk held by an institutional investor. This information informs investment recommendations for the investor

entities.name: Insurance Arrangement
entities.description: Insurance offerings bundled with superannuation products made available to employees of a participating employer partner.

entities.name: Insurance Coverage
entities.description: Details of the purpose for insurance cover

entities.name: Insurance Offering
entities.description: Details of insurance components part of superannuation product

entities.name: Insurance Policy Detail
entities.description: Information of insurance conditions and levels of cover within the policy

entities.name: Interest Rate Sensitivity
entities.description: A rating of how sensitive the value of an investment fund is to changes in official interest rates.

entities.name: Internal Data Brief
entities.description: A request, and corresponding data set provided in response, for internal IFL member data to be used to inform a market research project or marketing campaign.

entities.name: Internal Due Diligence Assessment
entities.description: To ensure supplier data is complete, accurate, and risk-assessed, supporting compliant and informed procurement decisions.

entities.name: Internally-identified customer issue
entities.description: Issues affecting customer that likely require action by IFL to remediate, but which have not been raised directly by customer themselves. These issues may affect a cohort of customer, and information includes the list of customers affected, the nature of the issue, and possibly details of actions to remediate.

entities.name: Investment
entities.description: An Investment represents a financial asset offered to an individual or institutional customer either as a standalone investment or as part of a portfolio making up a product.

entities.name: Investment Assets
entities.description: Assets in which the investment funds are invested

entities.name: Investment Detail
entities.description: Information of the investment where funds are invested

entities.name: Investment Details
entities.description: Charactering information for an investment

entities.name: Investment Fees
entities.description: Investment management expenses and charges

entities.name: Investment Income
entities.description: The value of earnings from investments on accounts held by the customer.

entities.name: Investment Instruction
entities.description: Details of how received funds are to be allocated across investments within account

entities.name: Investment Name
entities.description: Descriptive label used to refer to the investment.

entities.name: Investment Offering
entities.description: Details of the investment assets making up the product

entities.name: Investment Performance
entities.description: The historical information of the invested funds value, transactions, movement and activity

entities.name: Investment Performance Attribution
entities.description: Explanation of the investment's performance

entities.name: Investment Research
entities.description: Third party dataset, general economic data, peer competitors

entities.name: Investment Risk Analysis
entities.description: Forward looking risk assessment, includes stress test, is reported to various audiences.

entities.name: Investment Structure
entities.description: Describes the investment boundaries and costs to operate within

entities.name: Investment Type
entities.description: Managed Scheme, Superannuation trust

entities.name: Investment Unique Identifier
entities.description: Unique identifiers (IFL-generated and/or publicly available unique IDs) for investment funds.

entities.name: Investor Company Structure
entities.description: Information related to the corporate structure of an institutional investor, including information on organisational structure, office holders and key personnel.

entities.name: Invoice
entities.description: A document received from a supplier raising an expense.

entities.name: Issues
entities.description: Situations that have eventuated that if not resolved will negatively impact the project.

entities.name: Job Advert Position Description
entities.description: Description of required position

entities.name: Job Description
entities.description: Description of the function of the position, outline of expectaction, duties to fulfil and deliver

entities.name: Job Requisition
entities.description: Information of new position request

entities.name: Jurisdiction Risk Rating
entities.description: List of countries risk rating. Based on sanctions both from Insignia and Australian Government

entities.name: Key Contact
entities.description: Main contact person working at the employer whose employees are IFL superannuation clients.

entities.name: Key Control Test Plan
entities.description: Plan for testing the effectiveness of a risk control.

entities.name: KYC Verification
entities.description: Sub-set of customer identification required to confirm identification and critical risk information

entities.name: Language
entities.description: Preferred Language, spoken and written

entities.name: Learning and Development Support Plan
entities.description: Details of the support and training material, identified people to train and timeframe for running courses required to deliver change to future state

entities.name: Lease Agreements
entities.description: Details of tenant agreement for leasing of property or equipment, including dates, make good arrangements

entities.name: Leave Entitlement
entities.description: Annual leave, personal leave, long service leave, parental leave

entities.name: Legal
entities.description: Legal information relates to legal advice, compliance with regulatory and legal obligations, policies, contractual agreements and legal disputes.

entities.name: Legal Advice
entities.description: Advice provided to boards and committees

entities.name: Legal Matter
entities.description: Engagement and advice provided on legal matter by external law firm

entities.name: Legislated Outcomes Assessment
entities.description: Details the information considered by the Board to make its annual written determination as to whether the financial interests of the beneficiaries of the product are being promoted by IFL, based on the prescribed set of product comparisons (i.e. relative to other products in the market) and product assessments.  Note that sensitivity classification is Public only once published, Highly Confidential before.

entities.name: Letter of Engagement
entities.description: Acknowledgement from client to proceed with advice, includes fees for advice

entities.name: Licensee, Remuneration Agreement
entities.description: Advisor agreement between trustee and licensee, fees, terms etc

entities.name: Liquidity of Investment
entities.description: A rating of how easily holdings in an investment can be bought or sold.

entities.name: Location
entities.description: The Australian state and the archival services supplier (if not IFL) where the archive is physically located.

entities.name: Log File
entities.description: Raw data generated by application and infrastructure usage that logs time, date, user, and other relevant data associated with usage events.

entities.name: Maintenance and Support
entities.description: Describes the events to support systems, data and system users and their importance and impact on business functionality

entities.name: Major Program
entities.description: Collection Initiatives as a major piece of work

entities.name: Major Project
entities.description: Project information describes opportunities and initiativies and their implementation.

entities.name: Management Report
entities.description: A version of advice complaint report submitted to IFL management in order to support internal actions resulting from the findings.

entities.name: Market Research
entities.description: Information related to understanding the customer market for IFL.

entities.name: Marketing
entities.description: Marketing is engagement with the marketplace to inform and promote Insignia products and services. Marketing information includes market analysis, marketing plans as well as information related to marketing campaigns and their effectiveness.

entities.name: Marketing Analytics
entities.description: Client information analysis, through predictive analysis and activity metrics

entities.name: Marketing Consent
entities.description: Specifies if Insignia is allowed to provide client with marketing related communications

entities.name: Marketing Strategy
entities.description: A plan based on an identified opportunity to provide business value through client engagement. Supported by marketing data and delivered through campaigns.

entities.name: Marketing Strategy Financial Costing
entities.description: Budget to deliver initiative and calculated return from implementing initiative

entities.name: Marketing Strategy Key Performance Indicators
entities.description: Definitions and targets to track outcomes of strategy

entities.name: Marketing Strategy Objective
entities.description: A statement of an intended outcome for a given marketing campaign, against which the success of the campaign can be measured

entities.name: Material Risk Category
entities.description: Broad category of material risks against which IFL expresses a risk appetite statement.

entities.name: Materiality Report
entities.description: Report to Board (SRM Dashboard) of incidents related to dealing with material suppliers

entities.name: Matter
entities.description: Legal advice provided on an internal IFL matter.

entities.name: Matter Files
entities.description: Documents prepared for outcomes of matter findings

entities.name: Matter Notes
entities.description: Details of comments and notes taken related to matter

entities.name: Member / Investor Representation
entities.description: Details to provide board with oversight of member/investors focused outcomes. Member Office and Office of Responsible Entity ensure interests of members/investors are adhered to with regards to trusts.

entities.name: Member Insurance
entities.description: Insurance Policy for a customer

entities.name: Member Life Cycle Expected Value
entities.description: The expected monetary value of a client's relationship with IFL, from when it begins to when it ends.

entities.name: Member Returns
entities.description: Information of the performance of funds returned to members.  Note that sensitivity classification is Public only once published, Highly Confidential before.

entities.name: Name Screen
entities.description: A list of names against which to check clients.  Names on the list are those of people who present a high-risk of fraudulent or criminal behaviour.

entities.name: Nature of Advice
entities.description: General in nature, Scaled (simple advisor guided or calculator, for single fund), Comprehensive (full financial circumstance considered)

entities.name: Nature of Fund
entities.description: Categorisation of the nature of the institutional investor, eg. Industry superannuation fund; endowment; insurance fund, etc.

entities.name: Net Flow
entities.description: Balance of movement of funds in and out of the investment.

entities.name: Net Performance
entities.description: Historical actual investment value relative the fund for prior period

entities.name: Network Equipment Information
entities.description: Information about networking equipment deployed at IFL.

entities.name: Network Integration
entities.description: Network-specific aspects of a technology solution design.

entities.name: Network User List
entities.description: List of network and system accounts including assigned groups

entities.name: Non-financial Offering
entities.description: Offerings made available to clients with accounts for certain products, through rewards programs or other non-financial offering. Information of participants, usage and points balance. Note, sensitivity classification is Public for general product information, Confidential for usage and points. [Consider splitting into two, product info and usage data]

entities.name: Obligation Owner
entities.description: The person at IFL accountable for ensuring that IFL is compliant with an identified obligation.

entities.name: Obligations
entities.description: Legislative requirements recorded

entities.name: Organisation Hierarchy
entities.description: IFL organisational structure

entities.name: Other Tax Information
entities.description: Supporting documentation and other records used to manage IFL Group's tax affairs other than tax returns and assessments

entities.name: Owner
entities.description: The business owner of the physical archive

entities.name: Parent Account
entities.description: Forms hierarchy of accounts to aggregate to group level

entities.name: Participants
entities.description: The groups of people from whom research data is collected.

entities.name: Pattern exception reviews
entities.description: Documentation of applications to deviate from standard IFL technology architecture practices.

entities.name: Payer
entities.description: Party making payment to IFL

entities.name: Payment Terms
entities.description: Arrangements agreed to for the payment of invoices.

entities.name: Penetration Test
entities.description: Results from third party penetration test, recording type of testing performed, weaknesses of system security

entities.name: People
entities.description: People information describes employees and contractors who perform work for Insignia Financial. It includes information about the organisation hierarchy, roles, positions and recruitment of staff and working conditions.

entities.name: Person
entities.description: A person is engaged to work with Insignia as employee, contractor, advisor or out-sourced capacity. Also include Bots (System Accounts)

entities.name: Person Address
entities.description: Address information for contacting eg, residential, postal, business

entities.name: Person Contact
entities.description: Details of contact methods of person

entities.name: Person Details
entities.description: Attributes about a person

entities.name: Person Email
entities.description: Email address/es

entities.name: Person in Job History
entities.description: History of different positions and jobs that the person has had while being employed at the company

entities.name: Person Job Commencement Date
entities.description: The date person started job at a particular position within Insignia

entities.name: Person Name
entities.description: First name, last name, preferred name

entities.name: Person Telephone
entities.description: Various telephone numbers to contact person

entities.name: Person Type
entities.description: Person engagement type at Insignia

entities.name: Personal Financial Position
entities.description: Details of the financial arrangements and current financial situation of a client receiving financial advice

entities.name: Physical Record Archive
entities.description: Information of a physical archive's location, content and owner

entities.name: Plan
entities.description: The set of activities involved in a marketing research project

entities.name: Plan Assessment / Evaluation
entities.description: A post-change review of the effectiveness of a change plan.

entities.name: Politically Exposed Person
entities.description: A person who presents a higher level or risk to IFL due to political associations.

entities.name: Position
entities.description: Role within Insignia that conducts necessary task/duties

entities.name: Position Compliance Obligation
entities.description: Mandatory training required to be completed for a position at Insignia as specified by internal or external policy obligations

entities.name: Post Implementation Review
entities.description: Review of the campaign delivery and impact. Audience activity

entities.name: Precedents Checklist
entities.description: A checklist maintained by each lawyer that contains notes and conversations of the working matters.

entities.name: Procurement
entities.description: Procurement is information about acquisition, maintenance and disposal of physical assets such as equipment, buildings and fixtures. It also includes procurement of services from external parties.

entities.name: Product
entities.description: A product is an offering made available to a client.  Predominantly these are financial products that include superannuation, insurance and retail investment packages.  It also includes client loyalty programs and other services.

entities.name: Product Category
entities.description: The class of investment assets incorporated as part of product

entities.name: Product Comparison
entities.description: Comparative information that allows a client to understand the relative advantages and disadvantages of a selected range of investment products.

entities.name: Product Component
entities.description: Describes the construct of a product as a superannuation or investment vehicle

entities.name: Product Cost to Serve
entities.description: A measure of the cost to provide clients with service for each IFL product offering

entities.name: Product Details
entities.description: Information of the product objectives, strategy, description of handling of funds and product purpose

entities.name: Product Disclosure
entities.description: Investment Product Disclosure Statement or superannuation Product Offer Document

entities.name: Product Fees
entities.description: Details of fees, rates and charges management and servicing the product

entities.name: Product Hierarchy
entities.description: Describes the product, division and platform hierarchy to which a product belongs.

entities.name: Product Identification
entities.description: Identifying code provided by governing body (ABN, ACN) or internal coding (product code number)

entities.name: Product Investments
entities.description: The investment asset available for funds in the product to be invested into

entities.name: Product Objectives
entities.description: Information of expected investment term timeframe and asset allocation strategy

entities.name: Product Obligations
entities.description: Design and distribution obligations attached to the product. In the main this relates to whether potential clients require advisor advice in order to to be offered the product.

entities.name: Product Owner
entities.description: The trustee responsible for the product

entities.name: Product Performance
entities.description: Information of metrics used to monitor a product actual and targeted performance

entities.name: Product Research
entities.description: Product details of performance, construct and fees across various financial providers for the advice being put forward

entities.name: Product Risk Profile
entities.description: The exposure the product will have to asset investments

entities.name: Product Status
entities.description: Is product active, open, terminated, retired or closed

entities.name: Professional Development
entities.description: Agreed plan to ensure advisor has necessary skills and education to be capable and authorised to provide personal financial advice

entities.name: Profit and Loss
entities.description: Expenses and Revenue for period

entities.name: Prohibited Customer
entities.description: A list of clients who are prohibited from doing business with IFL.

entities.name: Project Artefacts
entities.description: Documents and other information assets developed specifically to manage the project, or produced as deliverables from the project

entities.name: Project Audit
entities.description: Information related to review of project performance and delivery.

entities.name: Project Benefits
entities.description: A statement of the benefits that the project should deliver if it achieves its stated goals and objectives.

entities.name: Project Financial Allocation
entities.description: Forecasts, Budget, actuals, Approval process., cost items, SOW, total spend

entities.name: Project Plan
entities.description: Provides timelines of tasks required to deliver a project along with financial and resource budgeting

entities.name: Project Proposal
entities.description: Outlines an opportunity or a need identified that resolves an issue or enhances business functionality.

entities.name: Project Resources
entities.description:
People and equipment required to enable delivery of project work.
Project manager, stakeholder, third party, developers, testers, applications.

entities.name: Project Risk and Issues
entities.description: Potential occurences that will hinder or decrease the expected value of successful project completion.

entities.name: Project Scope
entities.description: Benefits, ROI, opportunity canvas, initiatives canvas

entities.name: Project Stakeholders
entities.description: The business area/s and key stakeholder of the project. Sponsros, directors and steering committees.

entities.name: Project Status
entities.description: Monitor of project progress, tracking to forecast and changes to project scope.

entities.name: Project Timelines
entities.description: Project plans, roadmaps and schedules that represent the chronology of a project.

entities.name: Prospective Customer
entities.description: Relationship between Advisor and Prospective Client where no statement of advice has been signed

entities.name: Provider of Goods and Services
entities.description: Details of engaged supplier of goods and services

entities.name: Purchase
entities.description: Information of acquiring goods and services

entities.name: Purchase Authorisation
entities.description: Approval of a purchase request including who authorised it.

entities.name: Purchase Order
entities.description: Information of the goods and services provided, when, where, supplier and cost

entities.name: Purchase Order Invoice
entities.description: Supplier provided details for requesting payment of goods and services. Includes payment arrangements and summary of provided goods and services

entities.name: Purchase Order Reference
entities.description: A document produced by IFL requesting goods or services from a vendor.

entities.name: Purchase Request
entities.description: A request to purchase goods or services on behalf of the business.

entities.name: Purchased Goods and Services
entities.description: Details of the purchased goods and services provided by supplier to Insignia

entities.name: Receivable Type
entities.description: Classification of the type of payment received from a payer.

entities.name: Recommendation
entities.description: A course of actions recommended to a client receiving financial advice on how to structure their finances and/or to be taken in relation to investments.

entities.name: Recommendations
entities.description: Recommendations from a financial auditor for actions arising from the findings contained in an audit report.

entities.name: Record Management
entities.description: Details of physical and digital records usage, purpose, contents and storage

entities.name: Record of Advice Amendment
entities.description: Alteration to financial plan upon review, which may require client acknowledgement

entities.name: Record Usage
entities.description: Information related to the access and return of physical records

entities.name: Recruiting Manager
entities.description: Details of Hiring manager

entities.name: Registrable Superannuation Entity Business Plan
entities.description: Business Plan is the information outlining the strategic aims for member outcomes, Regstritable Superannuation Entity

entities.name: Relationship Manager
entities.description: IFL person managing the relationship between IFL and an employer whose employees are IFL superannuation clients.

entities.name: Remediation Event
entities.description: Actions, including the time and date, taken as a result of a resolution to a demand.

entities.name: Remuneration
entities.description: Compensation for work engaged

entities.name: Reporting Body
entities.description: eg APRA, ASIC, ASX, Government

entities.name: Reporting Entity
entities.description: The person, IFL business unit or external party that has alerted IFL to an incident having occurred

entities.name: Reporting Manager
entities.description: Supervising person responsible for reviews and approvals

entities.name: Reports
entities.description: Information about the number of boxes and records and their location for an archive

entities.name: Request for Proposal
entities.description: A document requesting proposals from technology vendors.

entities.name: Research Data
entities.description: Data collected during a market research project which is the raw material analysed to produce findings.

entities.name: Research Design
entities.description: The planned market research activities outlining method, type of data and analyses to be performed to address the research project's questions.

entities.name: Research Hypotheses
entities.description: A set of propositions about the client market to be tested by the research project.

entities.name: Research Project
entities.description: A defined research project with research questions, hypotheses, data collection, analysis and findings in relation to IFL's client market.

entities.name: Research Report
entities.description: A report outlining the findings and conclusions of a market research project.

entities.name: Resolution Letter
entities.description: A letter sent to the customer outlining IFL's resolution of the demand.

entities.name: Responsible Entity
entities.description: Information concept that covers all the governance and finance concepts in the BIM for IFL, which are replicated at the trust level, which may have different information ownership

entities.name: Retail Research House
entities.description: A third-party investment research organisation that advises and recommends investment strategies to customer. Provides information on fund structures, styles and performance. Also known as institutional consultant.

entities.name: Retention Period
entities.description: The minimum period for which records in the archive should be retained before being destroyed.

entities.name: Retention Schedule
entities.description: A schedule of record types and their associated minimum retention periods, after which records should be destroyed.

entities.name: Review Frequency
entities.description: How frequently risk tolerances are reviewed by the business.

entities.name: Risk
entities.description: Risk information describes Insignia's exposure to or occurrence of adverse events and plans for their management. It includes risk registers, controls and risk appetite assessments.

entities.name: Risk Appetite
entities.description: Tolerance, for business unit and across business levels, material risk categories, appetite metrics

entities.name: Risk Appetite of Customer
entities.description: An evaluation of a customer's risk appetite of various financial aspects. Investing, debt, circumstance

entities.name: Risk Appetite Statement
entities.description: Statement of risk appetite principles and contextual information for IFL, as well as specification of tolerance levels for managing identified risks.

entities.name: Risk Appetite Tolerance Measure
entities.description: A measured variable related to an identified business risk.

entities.name: Risk Description
entities.description: A statement outlining the nature of the identified business risk.

entities.name: Risk Owner
entities.description: Person accountable for ensuring that an identified business risk is managed within the risk management framework.

entities.name: Risk Rating
entities.description: An assessment of the impact of an identified risk if it eventuates, as critical, high, medium or low.

entities.name: Risk Tolerance
entities.description: Specified values for a measured risk variable defining tolerence levels: Within, Review Trigger, Outside Tolerence

entities.name: Risks
entities.description: Potential occurences that have not yet eventuated that will negatively impact the project if they occur.

entities.name: RSE Plan Initiatives
entities.description: Information about projects and programs of work that will deliver outcomes in order to achieve the RSE's business plan objectives

entities.name: Security
entities.description: Capturing and assessing technology based security events and platforms across the organisation.

entities.name: Security Assessment
entities.description: Review of people, processes and systems that evaluates the cyber security of the organisation and preparediness

entities.name: Security Controls
entities.description: Security-specific aspects of a technology solution design.

entities.name: Security Incident
entities.description: An event that is potentially a security breach requiring a response.

entities.name: Security Monitoring and Alert
entities.description: Information in support of the monitoring of applications and technology infrastructure usage to identify potential security incidents and breaches.

entities.name: Server and Network Infrastructure
entities.description: Information about IFL servers and networking equipment.

entities.name: Server List
entities.description: List of IFL computer servers

entities.name: Service Agreement
entities.description: Arrangement details licensee has with IFL when they agree to use Insignia super and investment products

entities.name: Service Provider
entities.description:
Buildings occupied by Insignia and assets utilised

for example: software, technology, hardware, building, furniture, etc.

entities.name: Service Provider Assessment
entities.description: The structured evaluation of a supplier’s capability, performance, and compliance against business and procurement requirements to ensure value, quality, and risk management.

entities.name: Service Provider Reporting
entities.description: Structured reporting of supplier performance, compliance, and service delivery against contractual and procurement requirements.

entities.name: Service Provider Risk Management
entities.description: Process of identifying, assessing, and controlling risks arising from third-party service providers to protect procurement, business operations, and compliance obligations

entities.name: Service Provider Sourcing
entities.description: Identifying and selecting external service providers.

entities.name: Service Survey
entities.description: Party assessment of demand service based on survey questions, Net Promoter Score, Etc

entities.name: Share Listing
entities.description: The information for IFL to listed on a stock exchange.  Note that sensitivity classification is Public only once published, Highly Confidential before.

entities.name: Share Price
entities.description: Individual share price amount list on stock exchange

entities.name: Share Trading Restrictions
entities.description: Periods when IFL shares are not permitted to be traded for IFL staff

entities.name: Shareholder Registry
entities.description: List of IFL shareholders and the amount of IFL shares held.

entities.name: Skill Requirement
entities.description: Skill set required to complete task

entities.name: Solution Architecture
entities.description: A specified design for a techology solution.

entities.name: Sourcing Event (RFP)
entities.description:
List of Insignia approved supplier of services and goods, following due-diligence check.

This includes, service provider responses to meeting IFL's requirements for evaluation. This may include, due diligence

entities.name: Statement of Advice
entities.description: Statement of Advice is information of financial plan put forward by advisor to client based on products and fact finding details. Including risks, strategies and financial circumstance.

entities.name: Strategic Asset Allocation
entities.description: The defined proportions of asset types and risk levels that funds are spread across for the investment

entities.name: Strategy
entities.description: Strategy information relates to strategic business plans and their execution. This includes objectives and goals, major projects, business unit strategic plans as well as monitoring of their progress and effectiveness.

entities.name: Strategy Initiatives
entities.description: Details of the initiatives to implement the enterprise strategy

entities.name: Strategy Metric Targets
entities.description: Definitions of target metrics to for the strategy initiative to meet

entities.name: Strategy Period
entities.description: The forward looking period for the enterprise strategy, upto 5 years ahead

entities.name: Support Action
entities.description: Actions taken in response to a support ticket in an effort to resolve the relevant issue.

entities.name: Support Ticket
entities.description: A record of a request or notice of an issue for resolution, raised by a technology user

entities.name: Survey Responses
entities.description: Data provided by research participants in response to a survey questionaire.

entities.name: Systemic Issue Committee Endorsement
entities.description: Decision by the Systemic Issue Committee confirming that a submission to the committee is evidence of a systemic issue to be managed by IFL.

entities.name: Systemic Issue Committee Submission
entities.description: Documentation outlining identification of a supposed systemic issue that IFL will need to manage.

entities.name: Systemic Issue Remediation Plan
entities.description: An issue management plan outlining the actions required to address an identified systemic issue.

entities.name: Systems
entities.description: System and applications utilised in the business

entities.name: Target Audience
entities.description: Clients or partners to be provided campaign material to convey message

entities.name: Target State Conceptual View
entities.description: A representation of the business and technology state after a proposed technology solution has been implemented.

entities.name: Taxation
entities.description: Taxation records arising from income producing activities for IFL, investment assets managed by Insignia and clients

entities.name: Technology
entities.description: Technology information relates to the IT systems and equipment used to support Insignia business practices. It includes information about security, the design, platform vendor and other information to ensure the technology infrastructure is fit for purpose.

entities.name: Technology Approved Product Register
entities.description: A list of technology products available in the marketplace that have been pre-assessed in relation to their security and fit with the IFL technology landscape.

entities.name: Technology Guidelines / Guardrails
entities.description: Policy and standards controls to minimise risk with technology change

entities.name: Technology Integration Patterns
entities.description: Standardised general solutions within IFL for integrating different technologies.  Design solutions should align with agreed patterns or apply for an exemption.

entities.name: Technology Option Assessment
entities.description: An assessment and recommendation of the suitability for a technology solution against a defined set of business requirements.

entities.name: Technology Product
entities.description: Supplied product, version, etc., including hardware and software

entities.name: Technology Roadmap
entities.description: Planned, scheduled activities in order to implement a technology strategy.

entities.name: Technology Strategy
entities.description: A set of technology-related objectives and the initiatives required to achieve them.

entities.name: Technology Support
entities.description: Information related to providing support to technology users.

entities.name: Tender Consultant
entities.description: Employer representative for the interests of the default superannuation, advises Employer to change fund manager

entities.name: Tenure
entities.description: How long the person is in a particular position within the organization

entities.name: Terms and Conditions
entities.description: Rules, expectation and guidelines expected for engaged contract

entities.name: Third Party Consent
entities.description: Allow Advisor to access information or raise demand on behalf of customer

entities.name: Training and Skills
entities.description: Education performed or required for a position. Also the plan to for a person to develop necessary skills or knowledge to meet objectives

entities.name: Transaction
entities.description: Journal entry within a general ledger to move money between accounts

entities.name: Transaction Amount
entities.description: The amount in dollars for the transaction.

entities.name: Transaction Date
entities.description: The calendar date on which a transaction occurred

entities.name: Transaction Monitoring Framework/ Fraudulent Activity
entities.description: Framework and rules to detect scenarios like anomalies in behaviour, transaction patterns, high risk entities, hidden relationships

entities.name: Transaction Monitoring Rules
entities.description: Specification of rules that are applied to determine whether a transaction requires investigation.

entities.name: Transaction Service Level Agreement
entities.description: Duration required to complete transaction before considered in breach. Regulatory bodies establish SLA target by transaction type

entities.name: Trust
entities.description: Information concept that covers all the governance and finance concepts in the BIM for IFL, which are replicated at the trust level, which may have different information ownership

entities.name: Unit Holders
entities.description: List of clients with holdings in fund, also for external members (non IFL clients)

entities.name: Unit Price
entities.description: Describes the lowest share of the investment based on the underlying value of the invested assets for a day

entities.name: Value Stream Agendas
entities.description: Items for each value stream committee to address at regular meetings

entities.name: Value Stream Approvals
entities.description: Records of decisions made by value stream governance bodies for approval of initiatives or initiative components

entities.name: Value Stream Board / Committee Papers
entities.description: Reference material to support agenda items or discussion papers

entities.name: Value Stream Governance
entities.description: IFL Value Streams, are groupings of like initiatives supporting our Strategic Objectives, enabling holistic governance, and providing clear structures to escalate issues and get quick decisions made

entities.name: Value Stream Minutes
entities.description: Outcomes and notes of the value stream meetings, attendees, meeting date, actions items arising from meeting

entities.name: Vendor
entities.description: The external supplier of a good or service to IFL

entities.name: Vendor responses
entities.description: Vendor-supplied responses to a request for proposal.

entities.name: Vulnerability Assessment
entities.description: Identified vulnerability in systems or applications and impact including remediation to close security vulnerability

entities.name: Working Rights
entities.description: Working Visa, special conditions, personal Full-time equivalent or restriction for person
